exercises.title: Rate-Distance Optimizer
exercises.description: Build a tool to analyze and optimize distribution rates.
tasks: Calculate rate vs distance for direct, heralded protocols
Find maximum practical distance for target rate
Optimize source rate and detector parameters

exercises.title: Multiplexing Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate multiplexed distribution with realistic parameters.
tasks: Implement temporal, spectral, and spatial multiplexing
Model mode switching with quantum memories
hints: Memory loss reduces benefit at high N
Optimal N depends on memory coherence

exercises.title: Heralded Distribution Protocol
tasks: Include realistic BSM efficiency (50% linear optics)
Track herald success and failure statistics
hints: BSM at midpoint needs both photons

exercises.title: System Design Tool
exercises.description: Design complete distribution system for given requirements.
tasks: Input: target distance, rate, fidelity requirements
hints: Trade off rate vs fidelity vs distance
